hook: Brand new vs resale landed: the data shows who blinked first

slides.sub: New launches hold firm while resale sellers absorb softening bids — the gap is widening.

slides.lead: Resale landed caveats are printing below 2024 peaks across OCR and CCR.

slides.pre: Sentosa Cove Coral Island — latest resale psf
slides.post: Feb 2025 print at 737 sqm / S$14.8M vs Feb 2023's S$17.39M on same street.

slides.title: Three forces squeezing resale landed now

items.body: Coral Island detached: -15% in 24 months. S$17.39M (Feb '23) → S$14.8M (Feb '25). Price discovery, not panic.
Faber Hills semis held better — S$7.1M in Jan '25 vs S$7.0M in Jun '24 — OCR resale more sticky than CCR.
Springwood terraces (D05, RCR) dipped: S$4.09M Jun '24 → S$3.9M Jul '25, a quiet -4.7% slide in 13 months.

slides.source: URA caveats · POV Guy analysis · Apr 2026

slides.label: The real signal
slides.punch: CCR landed (Sentosa Cove) is repricing 10–15% below 2023 peaks. OCR resale is stickier — sellers there haven't blinked yet.
slides.punch_bold: The buyer who waits for OCR to follow CCR down may wait a long time.

slides.title: Where transactions are still clearing

items.body: Faber Hills (D05 OCR): 6 semi-D caveats lodged in H2 2024 alone — volume held despite softer PSF prints.
Springwood (D05 RCR): 4 terrace deals from Jul 2025–Mar 2026, suggesting steady if not rising buyer appetite.
Coral Island (D04 CCR): only 1 caveat in 2025 — liquidity has thinned sharply vs 3 trades in 2022 alone.

slides.source: URA caveats · POV Guy analysis · Apr 2026

slides.pre: Weighing landed in D4, D5 or D10?

slides.title: Forward this to
slides.sub: If you know anyone weighing a resale landed purchase this quarter, send them this before they bid.

caption:
📉 Resale landed is repricing — Coral Island down 15% in 24 months. Is OCR next?

• Coral Island (D04) printed S$14.8M in Feb 2025 vs S$17.39M in Feb 2023 — same street, -15%
• Faber Hills OCR semis are holding: S$7.1M in Jan 2025 vs S$7.0M in Jun 2024 — barely moved
• Springwood terraces quietly slipped -4.7% over 13 months — vol still there, price isn't rising

CCR landed is in price discovery. OCR is sticky for now — but thin volume is always the first warning sign.
